_comment: Register Peekaboo (steipete/peekaboo) as an MCP server. Peekaboo exposes pixel-accurate screen capture + accessibility-tree-aware GUI automation (click, type, scroll, menus, dialogs, hotkeys) over stdio. Requires brew install steipete/tap/peekaboo + macOS Screen Recording + Accessibility permissions granted to the binary. First invocation will pop OS permission dialogs — owner must approve once. After that, the agent can drive any macOS GUI through Peekaboo tools.
